description: A native button whose stitch operation communicates commitment through bounded compression and recovery.

a11y.reducedMotion: Remove translation and path animation; preserve commitment with border and fill state changes.
a11y.keyboardContract: Use native button activation and disabled semantics; do not simulate button behavior on a div.
a11y.nonVisualEquivalent: Loading, success, and error states are exposed in the accessible name or adjacent live region.
